item.title: Citigroup said to weigh buying US regional bank, Bloomberg News reports
item.description: Citigroup's top executives are вҖӢweighing buying a U.S. regional вҖҢbank, Bloomberg News reported on Friday, as the Wall Street вҖӢgiant looks to wrap вҖӢup a years-long effort to streamline вҒ its sprawling operations.

item.title: Exclusive: US sends subpoenas in Warner-Paramount antitrust review as probe picks up steam
item.description: The U.S. Department of Justice has sent subpoenas in its investigation of Paramount Skydance's acquisition of Warner Bros вҖӢDiscovery , three sources familiar with the matter told Reuters.

item.title: Fed's Paulson says Iran war increases risks to growth, inflation
item.description: Philadelphia Federal Reserve President Anna Paulson said on Friday the Iran war is creating challenges for вҖӢthe U.S. economy, while stopping short of saying what вҖҢthat might mean for near-term changes in monetary policy.

item.title: Fed's Barkin says 'fog' again obscuring economic outlook
item.description: The U.S. war with Iran and the rapid roll-out of artificial intelligence technologies have again clouded the outlook for the Federal Reserve, and make вҖӢit appropriate to keep interest rates on hold for now, Richmond Fed вҖҢPresident Thomas Barkin said on Friday.

item.title: Unilever shareholders to get majority stake in potential McCormick food deal, sources say
item.description: A proposed combination of Unilever's food business with U.S. spice maker McCormick вҖӢwould offer the British group's shareholders a majority stake in the new entity and tax benefits, two people familiar with the вҖҢmatter told Reuters.

item.title: Europe's aviation agency touts improving ties with FAA, Boeing
item.description: Europe's top aviation regulator signalled improved relations with the U.S. FAA and said Boeing was responding "in вҖӢthe appropriate manner" to regulatory scrutiny, suggesting recent transatlantic tensions вҖҢover aviation safety have eased.

item.title: Chile's Codelco logs $4.85 billion pre-tax profit in 'very difficult' 2025
item.description: Chilean state-owned Codelco [RIC:RIC:COBRE.UL], the world's largest copper producer, on Friday reported a pre-tax profit of $4.85 billion in 2025.

item.title: Utility Entergy says revised Meta data-center deal to deliver higher customer savings
item.description: Utility Entergy said Meta Platforms will pay its full cost of service for вҖӢthe planned hyperscale data center in вҖҢnortheast Louisiana under a revised agreement.

item.title: WTO at 'critical juncture' and needs deep reform, EU and CPTPP say
item.description: The World Trade Organisation is at a "critical juncture" and needs deep вҖӢreform, the European Union and parties to the Comprehensive and вҖҢProgressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific Partnership said on Friday.

item.title: US consumer sentiment hits three-month low as war stokes inflation fears
item.description: U.S. consumer sentiment fell more than expected in March touching a three-month low, as war in the Middle East stoked inflation вҖӢworries and cast a shadow over the economic outlook.

item.title: Iran-linked hackers breach FBI director's personal email, publish excerpts online
item.description: Iran-linked hackers on Friday claimed they had accessed вҖӢFBI Director Kash Patel's personal email inbox, publishing photographs of the вҖҢdirector and other documents to the internet.

item.title: US appeals court voids $16.1 billion judgment against Argentina over YPF seizure
item.description: A divided U.S. appeals вҖҢcourt on Friday struck down a $16.1 billion judgment against Argentina for seizing control of state-owned oil company YPF in 2012, a victory for Argentine President Javier Milei as he tries to stabilize the country's long-strained economy.

item.title: Sony to hike PlayStation 5 prices again as memory chip costs surge
item.description: Sony Group is raising global prices of its PlayStation 5 consoles, including a $100 вҖӢincrease in the U.S., marking its second hike вҖҢin less than a year as the Japanese firm grapples with rising costs of key components such as memory chips.

item.title: Cruise operator Carnival cuts annual profit forecast as fuel costs surge
item.description: Carnival Corp cut its annual profit forecast on Friday, вҖӢas higher fuel costs pressure the cruise operator's margins amid rising geopolitical вҖҢtensions.

item.title: Markets in Q1: Everything everywhere all at once
item.description: The first quarter of the year comes to an end next week after an extraordinary few months where the world's financial markets have been tossed around at the mercy of geopolitics, вҖӢwith the Iran war wiping $7 trillion off global stocks.

item.title: Middle East conflict drives record trading at NYSE-parent ICE
item.description: Shockwaves from the Middle East conflict have rippled through global markets, driving record trading at Intercontinental Exchange across energy, commodities, futures and options.

item.title: Emerging economies' record debt spree slumps into a freeze as Iran war rocks markets
item.description: A record start to the year for emerging-market debt sales has largely ground to a halt as worries вҖӢover the Iran war create havoc in the markets and push up borrowing costs, bankers and investors told Reuters, a situation that places a вҖҢnumber of nations in limbo.

item.title: NYSE-parent Intercontinental Exchange invests $600 million in Polymarket
item.description: Intercontinental Exchange said on Friday it had invested $600 вҖӢmillion in prediction markets platform Polymarket, вҖҢas the New York Stock Exchange parent expands into the fast-growing event-based trading segment.

item.title: Bus maker Marcopolo looks to exports to offset Brazil market slowdown
item.description: Brazilian bus manufacturer Marcopolo aims to offset a slowdown in its domestic market in 2026 вҖӢthrough growth in other Latin American countries and it вҖҢalso plans to enter the European market, executives told Reuters.

item.title: Austria plans social media ban for children under 14
item.description: Austria's conservative-led, three-party government plans to introduce a ban вҖӢon social media use for children under 14, вҖҢit said on Friday.

item.title: SpaceX's listing stirs up social media frenzy, ticker bets
item.description: From rocket launches drawing millions of YouTube views to social media frenzy вҖӢover its potential listing, SpaceX's debut is shaping up to be a landmark moment for Wall Street.

item.title: UK joins global push to rein in children's screen use with national guidance
item.description: Britain has told parents to curb young children's screen time, advising no screens for under-2s and up to an hour a day вҖӢfor 2- to 5-year-olds because prolonged solo use can disrupt sleep and вҖҢdisplace play and exercise.

item.title: Morning Bid: You can't handle the 'Truth'
item.description: Everything Mike Dolan and the ROI team are excited to read, watch and listen to over the weekend.

item.title: US equity funds rebound with strongest inflows in four months
item.description: U.S. equity funds drew strong inflows in the week to March 25 as hopes for de-escalation in the Middle вҖӢEast lifted sentiment after U.S. President Donald Trump postponed an вҖҢattack on Iranian energy infrastructure and proposed a deal to end the war.

item.title: Oaktree private credit fund to pay out 8.5% in redemption requests
item.description: A private credit fund owned by Oaktree Capital Management has decided to honor the entirety of 8.5% in redemption requests it received in the first quarter, according to a вҖӢregulatory filing on Friday, making it the latest asset manager to decide against capping withdrawals.

item.title: US stock futures subdued as Iran strike delay offers limited relief
item.description: U.S. stock index futures were muted on Friday even as investors assessed prospects вҖҢof de-escalation in the Middle East after another delayed deadline for U.S. strikes on Iran's energy infrastructure.

item.title: SoftBank secures $40 billion loan to fund further OpenAI investment
item.description: SoftBank Group вҖӢsaid on Friday вҖҢit has secured a $40 billion loan through вҖӢa bridge facility вҖӢto fund further investments вҒ in ChatGPT maker вҖӢOpenAI and for general corporate вҖӢpurposes.

item.title: US corn planting seen down, soy acres up as Iran war inflates costs, analysts say
item.description: The Iran war has upended the planting intentions of U.S. farmers, resulting in fewer acres of corn and the lowest quantity of spring wheat planted since 1970 as rising fertilizer and fuel costs and low grain prices dim the outlook вҖӢfor profits, analysts said ahead of a U.S. government report due on Tuesday.

item.title: Wall St Week Ahead US jobs data to give economic view for war-gripped markets
item.description: Next week's U.S. employment report headlines a fresh batch of economic data for stock investors, who also will closely follow developments in an Iran war that is entering its second month.

item.title: Global equity funds see biggest inflows in 2-1/2 months on Iran de-escalation hopes
item.description: Global equity funds attracted their biggest weekly inflow in nearly 2-1/2 months in the week through March 25 after U.S. President Donald Trump delayed strikes вҖӢon Iranian energy infrastructure, raising hopes of a temporary de-escalation and вҖҢeasing oil shock fears.
